name: Hot Cheese Fondue
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons chili powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour with chili powder and toss over shredded cheeses.
2. Pour beer into the slow cooker and cover with shredded cheese mixture.
3. Place garlic, green chilies, and jalapeno peppers on top of the cheese, if desired. Do not stir until the cheese has begun to melt.
4. Cook slowly until the cheese is melted and smooth. Stir occasionally. Serve hot with bread or vegetables.
